_note: Accepted key collisions in lang/ja.json, suppressed in `php artisan i18n:check` advisories (case-fold and near-fold). Listed groups are intentional — distinct meaning despite a near-identical key (e.g. `Link` リンク = a URL vs `Links` リンク集 = the link-list gadget title). Matching is on the exact key set, so adding another variant re-surfaces the group.
